욥기 12:2.content: “No doubt, but you are the people, and wisdom will die with you.

욥기 12:3.content: But I have understanding as well as you; I am not inferior to you. Yes, who doesn’t know such things as these?

욥기 12:4.content: I am like one who is a joke to his neighbor, I, who called on God, and he answered. The just, the blameless man is a joke.

욥기 12:5.content: In the thought of him who is at ease there is contempt for misfortune. It is ready for them whose foot slips.

욥기 12:6.content: The tents of robbers prosper. Those who provoke God are secure, who carry their god in their hands.

욥기 12:7.content: “But ask the animals, now, and they will teach you; the birds of the sky, and they will tell you.

욥기 12:8.content: Or speak to the earth, and it will teach you. The fish of the sea will declare to you.

욥기 12:9.content: Who doesn’t know that in all these, Yahweh’s hand has done this,

욥기 12:10.content: in whose hand is the life of every living thing, and the breath of all mankind?

욥기 12:11.content: Doesn’t the ear try words, even as the palate tastes its food?

욥기 12:12.content: With aged men is wisdom, in length of days understanding.

욥기 12:13.content: “With God is wisdom and might. He has counsel and understanding.

욥기 12:14.content: Behold, he breaks down, and it can’t be built again. He imprisons a man, and there can be no release.

욥기 12:15.content: Behold, he withholds the waters, and they dry up. Again, he sends them out, and they overturn the earth.

욥기 12:16.content: With him is strength and wisdom. The deceived and the deceiver are his.

욥기 12:17.content: He leads counselors away stripped. He makes judges fools.

욥기 12:18.content: He loosens the bond of kings. He binds their waist with a belt.

욥기 12:19.content: He leads priests away stripped, and overthrows the mighty.

욥기 12:20.content: He removes the speech of those who are trusted, and takes away the understanding of the elders.

욥기 12:21.content: He pours contempt on princes, and loosens the belt of the strong.

욥기 12:22.content: He uncovers deep things out of darkness, and brings out to light the shadow of death.

욥기 12:23.content: He increases the nations, and he destroys them. He enlarges the nations, and he leads them captive.

욥기 12:24.content: He takes away understanding from the chiefs of the people of the earth, and causes them to wander in a wilderness where there is no way.

욥기 12:25.content: They grope in the dark without light. He makes them stagger like a drunken man.
